MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF FAN, ZHIHUI SU, XIANG YUN SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR MAR-23-1998 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 220 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON MAR-30-1998 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

JUDGE PRO TEM PETER SHERWOOD COURT REPORTER MAUREEN BRADY COURT CLERK JOYCE WEIR ROOM 503-B CAUSE CALLED FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. ALL PARTIES PRESENT DEFENDANT, LUIS MUNIZ, IS IN PRO PER. CASE SETTLED ON THE RECORD. PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY IS TO PREPARE JUDGEMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MUNIZ, LUIS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 225 JULES AVE, S.F., LEASE FORFEITED, EXEC STAYED THRU 5/31/98. NO FURTHER STAYS. PLTF WVS RENT FOR MAR, APR & MAY 1998. EACH SIDE BEAR OWN COSTS & ATTY FEES. NO LEASE OF DEFT'S SUP CRT ACTION & NO MUTUAL RELEASE. PLTF PAY DEFT $1,500- BY 5PM 4/15/98 & RETURN $480- SEC DEP PER LAW & RETURN $160- IF CASHED BY PLTF. SEE JUDGMENT.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
